use_cases: FAQ sections on support and help pages
Expandable content sections for product documentation
Organizing long-form content into scannable sections
ai_summary: A clean, accessible FAQ accordion component built with Radix UI primitives featuring smooth expand/collapse animations, rotating chevron indicators, and full light/dark mode support. The component includes hover effects with subtle shadows and scale animations, making it ideal for support pages, documentation sites, or any interface requiring collapsible content sections.
